query_normalized: minwm: a full-stack open-source framework for real-time interactive video world models computer science
rationale: The paper surveys text‑to‑video generation methods and evaluates how they support world‑modeling capabilities, directly addressing the same domain of video world models (even if not a specific framework). This provides same‑mechanism evidence (category a) and serves as a foundational background for any work on real‑time interactive video world‑model frameworks.
